creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

You have this problem because galeon 0.7.1. designed for M16, while juging 
from your output you are trying to compile it with M17. I've just updated 
galeon port to 0.7.2. version, which should work with M17, so recvsup your 
ports and try again. 

Thanks!
